report_name: Anthropic's 'Mythos' AI Deemed Too Dangerous for Public Release After Finding Novel Exploits

attack_patterns.name: Obtain Capabilities: Vulnerabilities
attack_patterns.description: The Claude Mythos Preview AI model demonstrated the ability to automatically discover novel, high-severity software vulnerabilities in critical software like major operating systems and web browsers by analyzing source code or compiled binaries.

tools.name: Claude Mythos Preview
tools.description: An AI model developed by Anthropic with advanced capabilities for discovering novel cybersecurity vulnerabilities in software. Its release was withheld due to the potential for misuse.

campaigns.name: Project Glasswing
campaigns.description: A defensive initiative launched by Anthropic to provide the Mythos AI model to a select group of 11 technology companies to proactively find and patch critical flaws in global digital infrastructure.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: AI safety company that developed the Claude Mythos Preview model and initiated Project Glasswing to use it for defensive purposes.

identities.name: Google
identities.description: One of the 11 technology companies participating in Project Glasswing to use the Mythos AI model for vulnerability discovery.

identities.name: Apple
identities.description: One of the 11 technology companies participating in Project Glasswing to use the Mythos AI model for vulnerability discovery.

identities.description: One of the 11 technology companies participating in Project Glasswing to use the Mythos AI model for vulnerability discovery.
